description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) in autonomous mode, traveling north on Harrison St and turning right onto 13th Street in San Francisco drove 
over metal debris. The Zoox vehicle sustained minor damage to the undercarriage. There were no reported injuries and police were not 
called.
Print
Clear Form
